description_long: This is a classic ball-peen hammer featuring a robust, dark metallic head and a smoothly contoured wooden handle. The head has two distinct ends: one flat striking face for driving nails or shaping metal, and a rounded peen for metalworking tasks such as riveting or shaping. The handle is made of polished wood with a natural grain, slightly curved for ergonomic grip and control. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with no visible fasteners or joints. The hammer's surfaces are clean and free of visible wear, suggesting it is either new or well-maintained. No branding, logos, or additional attachments are present on the hammer.
description: A ball-peen hammer with a dark metal head and a polished, curved wooden handle. The head features a flat striking face and a rounded peen, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the top, showing the narrow width of the head and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the ball-peen head with its flat face and rounded peen, as well as the ergonomic curve of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: The bottom view displays the handle's end and the symmetrical alignment of the head, with the peen and striking face visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile mirrors view 1, again highlighting the ball-peen head and the smooth, curved wooden handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, polished finish and visible wood grain, designed for ergonomic grip.
attribute_head_type: Ball-peen hammer head with one flat striking face and one rounded peen, made of dark steel.
